---
title: "project-group-2"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library("tidyverse")
```
---

```{r}
job_salaries <- read_delim("Data/job-salaries.csv", delim = ",")
llm_data <- read_delim("Data/large-language-models.csv", delim = ",")
```
---

```{r}
head(job_salaries)
str(job_salaries)
summary(job_salaries)
```
---

```{r}
head(llm_data)
str(llm_data)
summary(llm_data)
```
